member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientBudgetKpiContactsSetupTests.ValidateBudgetReportExport(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Validates the budget report XLSX export and builds a map of sheet data. Exposed as a separate helper to keep tests concise.

member.name: T:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientBudgetReportUnbudgetedMirrorTests
member.summary: Integration tests for the Budget Report Unbudgeted Mirror functionality.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientBudgetReportUnbudgetedMirrorTests.#ctor(FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.TestWebApplicationFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ApiClientBudgetReportUnbudgetedMirrorTests class using the specified test web application factory. This constructor sets up the integration test environment for budget report functionality.
member.param: The TestWebApplicationFactory used to create a test server for the API client. Must not be null.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientBudgetReportUnbudgetedMirrorTests.BudgetReport_UnbudgetedPostings_ShouldOnlyContainNonMirroredSelfContactPostings_WhenSavingsPlanPostingsMirrorSelfContact
member.summary: Integrationstest: Wenn Sparplan-Buchungen auf das Self-Konto gespiegelt werden, m�ssen die Unbudgeted-Endpunkte die gespiegelten Self-Buchungen herausfiltern und nur tats�chlich ungeplante Self-Postings zur�ckgeben (hier: +12,34 �).

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientBudgetReportUnbudgetedMirrorTests.BudgetReport_ShouldRespectPurposePattern_ForActualAndUnbudgetedPostings
member.summary: Verifies that budget report and unbudgeted postings respect purpose patterns.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientBudgetReportUnbudgetedMirrorTests.BudgetReport_ShouldRespectRegexPurposePattern_ForActualAndUnbudgetedPostings
member.summary: Verifies that regex purpose patterns split matching and non-matching postings in report and unbudgeted results.

member.name: T:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientPostingsReversalTests
member.summary: Integration tests for the posting reversal API endpoints. Tests cover the full HTTP stack including authentication, authorization, and business rules. Each test creates an independent user and account to avoid cross-test state leakage.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientPostingsReversalTests.CreateClients
member.summary: Creates a typed API client together with the underlying raw HttpClient so tests can inspect HTTP status codes directly when needed.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientPostingsReversalTests.RegisterUserAsync(FinanceManager.Shared.ApiClient)
member.summary: Registers a fresh user (and auto-logs in via cookie) using a unique username.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientPostingsReversalTests.BookPostingViaStatementAsync(FinanceManager.Shared.ApiClient)
member.summary: Runs the full statement-import flow to produce a single booked posting. Returns the account id and the id of the first created posting.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientPostingsReversalTests.ReversePosting_ShouldReturn200_WithReversalResult_ForOwner
member.summary: L01 – Happy path: authenticated owner reverses a posting via POST /api/postings/{id}/reverse. Expects HTTP 200 with a ReversalResultDto containing valid ids.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientPostingsReversalTests.ReversePosting_ShouldReturn409_WhenAlreadyReversed
member.summary: L02 – Idempotency guard: reversing an already-reversed posting returns HTTP 409 Conflict.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientPostingsReversalTests.ReversePosting_ShouldReturn400_WhenUserIsNotOwner
member.summary: L03 – Cross-user reversal attempt: user B cannot reverse a posting owned by user A. NOTE: The controller documents HTTP 403 for this case, but the service actually throws InvalidOperationException (not UnauthorizedAccessException), so the actual response is HTTP 400 Bad Request. This is a known discrepancy; the test asserts the actual behaviour. See PostingsController.ReversePosting and PostingReversalService.ReversePostingAsync.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientPostingsReversalTests.ReversePosting_ShouldReturn400_WhenPostingNotFound
member.summary: L04 – Reversing a non-existent posting id returns HTTP 400 Bad Request.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientPostingsReversalTests.ValidateReversal_ShouldReturn200WithIsValidTrue_ForReversiblePosting
member.summary: L05 – GET /api/postings/{id}/validate-reversal returns HTTP 200 with IsValid = true for a posting that can be reversed by its owner.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientPostingsReversalTests.ReversePosting_ShouldReturn401_WhenNotAuthenticated
member.summary: L06 – Unauthenticated call to POST /api/postings/{id}/reverse returns HTTP 401 Unauthorized.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientStatementDraftsTests.StatementDrafts_Book_ShouldReturnBudgetImpactSummary_WhenBudgetPurposeExistsForContact
member.summary: Verifies that is populated at the client after booking a full draft when a matching budget purpose with a rule exists for the booked contact.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientStatementDraftsTests.StatementDrafts_Book_ShouldNotReturnImpactItems_WhenPurposePatternDoesNotMatch
member.summary: Verifies that budget impact checks respect purpose patterns on matching budget rules.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientStatementDraftsTests.StatementDrafts_Book_ShouldReturnImpactItems_WhenPurposePatternRegexMatches
member.summary: Verifies that booking returns budget impact items when a regex purpose pattern matches.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientStatementDraftsTests.StatementDrafts_Book_ShouldReturnImpactItems_WhenPurposePatternContainsMatchesCaseInsensitive
member.summary: Verifies case-insensitive contains purpose pattern matching in statement budget impact checks.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientStatementDraftsTests.StatementDrafts_BookEntry_ShouldReturnBudgetImpactSummary_WhenBudgetPurposeExistsForContact
member.summary: Verifies that is populated at the client when booking a single entry (partial booking) that has a matching budget purpose for its contact.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ApiClient.ApiClientStatementDraftsTests.StatementDrafts_Book_ShouldReturnNullBudgetImpactSummary_WhenNoBudgetPurposeExists
member.summary: Verifies that returns a neutral summary when no budget purpose exists for the booked contact.

member.name: P:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.TestWebApplicationFactory.FixedUtcNow
member.summary: When set, the factory will register a that returns this fixed UTC time. Set this property in tests before calling CreateClient() to force server-side "now".

member.name: T:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ViewModels.BudgetReportViewModelIntegrationTests
member.summary: Integration tests for the budget report view model.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ViewModels.BudgetReportViewModelIntegrationTests.InitializeAsync_TotalRange_ShouldShowHousingBookingsBudgeted_AndTrafficBookingUnbudgeted_WhenLoadedForCurrentYear
member.summary: Verifies that a one-year budget report keeps the regular housing bookings budgeted and leaves the traffic booking unbudgeted.

member.name: M:FinanceManager.Tests.Integration.ViewModels.BudgetReportViewModelIntegrationTests.InitializeAsync_LastInterval_ShouldShowHousingBookingsBudgeted_AndTrafficBookingUnbudgeted_WhenLoadedForCurrentYear
member.summary: Verifies that a one-year budget report keeps the regular housing bookings budgeted and leaves the traffic booking unbudgeted.
